response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'CIRCUS PANIC!!!' and 'ハッピーエンドプリンセス'. The video includes a central dialogue segment which I have transcribed and translated. I have discarded the unused lyrics from the reference JSON that do not appear in this specific video segment. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and I have maintained semantic continuity across mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: さて、今日も始めましょうか…
subtitles.english: Now, shall we begin today as well...

subtitles.original: あ～！ またやっちゃった～！
subtitles.english: Ah! I did it again!

subtitles.original: 実際はご覧の通り まだまだ未熟な見習いなんです
subtitles.english: In reality, as you can see, I'm still just an inexperienced apprentice

subtitles.original: 先人に憧れ持って 私も！と飛び込んだものの
subtitles.english: Admiring my predecessors, I dove right in, saying 'Me too!'

subtitles.original: 現実はそんな簡単に 上手くいかないなあ…
subtitles.english: But reality doesn't go that smoothly...

subtitles.original: もういっかい！ 「怪奇模した喜劇が幕開け 一目見ればたちまち虜に！？」
subtitles.english: One more time! 'A comedy mimicking the bizarre begins, and one look will make you a captive!?'

subtitles.original: え？ 既にそれさっき見たなら なら、飽き性なあなたにも【朗報】
subtitles.english: Eh? If you've already seen that just now, then, [Good News] for you who get bored easily

subtitles.original: Q. ちょっと前の模倣をするだけ
subtitles.english: Q. Just mimicking what happened a bit ago

subtitles.original: A. 繰り返しじゃつまらない！ だから、ここから先は趣向を変えてみよう！
subtitles.english: A. Repetition is boring! So, from here on, let's change things up!

subtitles.original: ドタバタなサーカスの行方は 誰にも自分すらも分からない！？
subtitles.english: The outcome of this slapstick circus, nobody knows, not even me!?

subtitles.original: 私を選んだ君だけでも楽しんでってよ～～～！！！ 損させないから
subtitles.english: At least you, who chose me, please enjoy yourself!!! I won't let you down

subtitles.original: いつの日か皆と楽しめる ショーがしたいんだよな～！
subtitles.english: I want to put on a show one day that everyone can enjoy!

subtitles.original: だからこそ、こんなとこで 挫けるわけとかないな～い！
subtitles.english: That's exactly why there's no way I'm giving up here!

subtitles.original: 言葉なんかじゃ言い表せない あの感動を私もいつか…
subtitles.english: I can't put it into words, that inspiration... I hope to one day...

subtitles.original: とても偉大なこのステージに 見合っているか分かんないけれど
subtitles.english: I don't know if I'm worthy of this great stage, but

subtitles.original: 観客全て、私の色で 染め尽くしてやろう！
subtitles.english: I'll dye every single audience member in my own colors!

subtitles.original: 手始めに、今、眼の前の君たちからいくよ～～～！！！
subtitles.english: To start off, I'm coming for you guys right in front of me now!!!

subtitles.original: 創造しよう 華々しいスポットライトの中 目を奪うような妙技の数々
subtitles.english: Let's create, amidst the glorious spotlight, many eye-catching feats

subtitles.original: この空間が世界で一番 “享楽”の名に相応しいんだ！
subtitles.english: This space is the most fitting in the world for the name 'Pleasure'!

subtitles.original: 割れんばかりの歓声と拍手で ショーが終わっていく
subtitles.english: With thunderous cheers and applause, the show comes to an end

subtitles.original: ああ…これが私が望んだ夢のエンディング。
subtitles.english: Ah... this is the dream ending I wished for.

subtitles.original: これは花の国のお姫様がこの王国へいらっしゃった時のお話
subtitles.english: This is a story about when the princess of the flower country came to this kingdom.

subtitles.original: まだみんな彼女の事を知らない頃だったので
subtitles.english: It was back when nobody knew about her yet,

subtitles.original: 国民の大半は、アホの子なんて言ってたけど、
subtitles.english: so most of the citizens called her an airhead, but...

subtitles.original: とっても心優しくそして気さくで頼りになるお姫様だったんだよ
subtitles.english: She was a very kind-hearted, friendly, and reliable princess.

subtitles.original: なんてったって、みこはお姫様なんだから！
subtitles.english: After all, Miko is a princess!

subtitles.original: 女神！
subtitles.english: Goddess!

subtitles.original: 聖女！
subtitles.english: Saint!

subtitles.original: 叡智！
subtitles.english: Wisdom!

subtitles.original: 聡明！
subtitles.english: Brightness!

subtitles.original: 慈愛！
subtitles.english: Benevolence!

subtitles.original: 博愛！
subtitles.english: Philanthropy!

subtitles.original: ですわ！
subtitles.english: Indeed!

subtitles.original: あたし なんてったってお姫様
subtitles.english: I'm a princess after all

subtitles.original: この人生におけるヒロイン
subtitles.english: The heroine of this life

subtitles.original: ですわー！
subtitles.english: Indeed!

subtitles.original: 一生 姫プでイージーモード！
subtitles.english: Princess-carry easy mode for life!

subtitles.original: って思ったら勝手にどうぞ？
subtitles.english: If that's what you think, go right ahead?

subtitles.original: 世間はいつも気まぐれ次第
subtitles.english: The world is always at its own whims

subtitles.original: 有象無象ばかりでホント 人間不信になっちゃう！
subtitles.english: Full of the common rabble, honestly, I'm losing faith in humanity!

subtitles.original: 気づいたのこの世界に 血も涙もないことを
subtitles.english: I realized that in this world, there's neither blood nor tears

subtitles.original: あれもダメ、これもダメ、それもダメ、 どれもダメ、現実は世知辛い！
subtitles.english: That's no good, this is no good, that too, none of it, reality is harsh!

subtitles.original: 改変だ…
subtitles.english: It's a reform...

subtitles.original: 全部改変ですわ…！
subtitles.english: It's a total reform...!

subtitles.original: あたし なんてったってお姫様
subtitles.english: I'm a princess after all

subtitles.original: この人生におけるヒロイン
subtitles.english: The heroine of this life

subtitles.original: 悲しいシナリオも全部全部書き換えちゃうの
subtitles.english: Even sad scenarios, I'll rewrite them all

subtitles.original: だってだって お姫様
subtitles.english: Because, after all, I'm a princess

subtitles.original: 自分の物語くらいは
subtitles.english: At the very least, my own story...

subtitles.original: キラキラ楽しまなきゃ ですわ！ですわ！ですわ！ですわ！
subtitles.english: I have to enjoy it sparklingly! Indeed! Indeed! Indeed! Indeed!

subtitles.original: 今にみてなさい！
subtitles.english: Just you watch!

subtitles.original: 運命なんて 改変して差し上げますわ！
subtitles.english: Destiny? I'll reform it for you!

subtitles.original: だれ？ だれ？ だれ？ だれ？
subtitles.english: Who? Who? Who? Who?

subtitles.original: 裏で糸を引いてるのはだれ？
subtitles.english: Who is pulling the strings behind the scenes?

subtitles.original: 操り人形だなんて
subtitles.english: Being a puppet...

subtitles.original: ごめんだわ まったく
subtitles.english: I'm quite done with that

subtitles.original: 上品な顔してても
subtitles.english: Even with an elegant face,

subtitles.original: 黒幕はあの人かも
subtitles.english: That person might be the mastermind

subtitles.original: まずはあたしが 強くならなきゃ
subtitles.english: First, I have to become stronger

subtitles.original: 未来は変わらない
subtitles.english: Future won't change

subtitles.original: 改革だ…
subtitles.english: It's a revolution...

subtitles.original: 自分改革ですわ…！
subtitles.english: It's a self-revolution...!

subtitles.original: そうよ なんてったってお姫様
subtitles.english: That's right, I'm a princess after all

subtitles.original: あたしこそ最高権力者
subtitles.english: I am the supreme ruler

subtitles.original: 生涯のすべての主導権はこちらにあるわ
subtitles.english: The initiative for all of my life lies here

subtitles.original: だってだって お姫様
subtitles.english: Because, after all, I'm a princess

subtitles.original: 自分で決めたことくらいは
subtitles.english: At least the things I decided for myself...
